author.bio:
We believe the internet has become humanity's most important technology. 
We build protocols, systems, and tools to improve how it works.
author.name: Protocol Labs

content.text:
Research is at the core of Protocol Labs. Today we're announcing a grant program with a $5 million initial commitment. First three RFPs support Filecoin and broader blockchain research.

https://protocol.ai/blog/ann-research-rfp/
